auth.signInSubtitle: Use email/password or a sign-in provider.

authErrors.providerUnavailable: The selected sign-in provider is not available right now.

authErrors.loginError: Could not sign in right now. Please try again.
authErrors.emailExists: This email address is already in use.

apiErrors.adminLoginRequired: You need to sign in as an administrator.

apiErrors.downloadLoginRequired: You need to be signed in to download files.
apiErrors.saveProductsFailed: Could not save the product list.
apiErrors.saveCourseAccessFailed: Could not save the access settings.
apiErrors.contentNotReady: The content could not be prepared for payment.
apiErrors.eventNotAvailable: This event is not available for payment right now.
apiErrors.courseNotAvailable: This course is not available for payment right now.
apiErrors.productNotReady: The product could not be prepared for payment.
apiErrors.productNotAvailable: This product is not available for payment right now.
apiErrors.checkoutFailed: Could not start the payment right now. Please try again soon.
apiErrors.productNotDownloadable: This product is not a downloadable file. See the product page in the shop.
apiErrors.noFileAccess: You don't have access to this file yet.
apiErrors.fileFetchFailed: Could not retrieve the file right now.
apiErrors.downloadFailed: Download failed. Please try again soon.
apiErrors.confirmLoginRequired: You need to be signed in to verify payment.
apiErrors.confirmMissingData: We could not verify your payment details.
apiErrors.confirmNotPaid: Your payment is not completed yet.
apiErrors.confirmEmailMismatch: The payment does not match your signed-in account.
apiErrors.confirmCourseMismatch: The payment is for a different course.
apiErrors.confirmFailed: We could not confirm the payment right now. Please try again.
apiErrors.uploadFailed: Could not save the image. Check your network and try again.
apiErrors.uploadWpFailed: Upload to WordPress media library failed (HTTP {status}). Is WORDPRESS_GRAPHQL_AUTH_TOKEN valid and media uploads allowed?
apiErrors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a while before trying again.

contactApi.emailSendFailed: Could not send the email right now.
contactApi.notConfigured: Email delivery is not configured. Set RESEND_API_KEY and RESEND_FROM_EMAIL.
contactApi.sendError: Could not send the message right now.
contactApi.sent: Thank you! We’ll get back to you shortly.
contactApi.subject: Contact form: {name}

admin.title: Admin
admin.runCheckHint: Run a check to verify integrations.
admin.ragbazPluginDesc: Download or install the GraphQL helper for LearnPress/events directly from this storefront.
admin.shopProductsHint: Manage files and course products for /shop. Uploaded files are saved to the WordPress media library (max file size depends on your WordPress configuration, typically 2–64 MB).
admin.uploadSizeHint: Max file size depends on WordPress settings (typically 2–64 MB)
admin.uploadSizeHintShort: Direct uploads up to ~95 MB; larger files use multipart automatically.
admin.uploadEdgeLimit: Edge R2 path: single PUT up to 100 MB, multipart for bigger files.
admin.uploadNodeLimit: Node path: multipart upload for large files.
admin.uploadAltLarge: For very large files (e.g. >2 GB), upload via an S3/R2 client like WinSCP or Cyberduck and paste the public URL.
admin.uploadClientHint: Use these values for a manual S3/R2 connection. Keep your secret key safe.
admin.clientSecretNotShown: Secret key is not shown here; copy it from .env when configuring your client.
admin.shopVisibilityDesc: Choose which product types appear on the public shop page (/shop). Only items with a price are shown. Each product links to its own page where the visitor can read more and purchase.
admin.shopTypeProductDesc: Products from WooCommerce in WordPress. Also shown at their own URL (e.g. /product/my-name).
admin.shopTypeCourseDesc: Courses from LearnPress in WordPress. Also shown at their course URL. Paywall handles access control.
admin.shopTypeEventDesc: Events with a configured price. Also shown at their event URL. Only events with a price set in admin appear in the shop.
admin.shopTypeDigitalFileDesc: Digital files (PDF, ZIP, etc.) created in admin under "Add product". Buyer downloads the file directly after payment.
admin.shopTypeDigitalCourseDesc: Course products created in admin that grant access to a course after purchase.
admin.priceSavedLocally: Price is saved to Cloudflare KV and used at Stripe checkout.
admin.fetchProductListFailed: Could not fetch the product list.
admin.deployNotConfigured: Deploy is not configured. Set GITHUB_DEPLOY_TOKEN and GITHUB_REPO.
admin.architectureHint: Overview of how your site is built. Content flows from WordPress through Next.js to Cloudflare, with Stripe handling payments.
admin.purgeCacheTooltip: Clear all cached pages so visitors see the latest content from WordPress. Use after publishing or editing posts.
admin.deployTooltip: Push the latest code to production. This rebuilds and publishes your site on Cloudflare.
admin.healthCheckDesc: Verify that WordPress, Stripe, and other services are connected and working. Run this after changing settings or if something seems off.
admin.healthTabDesc: Check that all external services are properly connected.
admin.shopProductsTabDesc: Create and manage downloadable files and course products sold in your /shop page.
admin.contentAccessTabDesc: Set prices and control who can access courses, events, and products.
admin.shopProductsDesc: Each product appears in the /shop page. Digital files can be downloaded after purchase. Course products unlock access to a course page.
admin.slugHint: URL-friendly name, generated automatically from the product name.
admin.productTypeHint: Digital file = downloadable after purchase. Course product = unlocks a course page.
admin.priceCentsHint: Price in the smallest currency unit (e.g. 9900 = 99.00 SEK).
admin.activeProductHint: Only active products are visible in the shop.
admin.fileUrlHint: The file buyers will download. Upload or paste a URL.
admin.courseUriHint: The course page this product unlocks (e.g. /courses/my-course).
admin.contentAccessDesc: Choose a product, course, or event below to set its price and manage who has access. The price here is what customers pay at checkout via Stripe.
admin.selectContentHint: Pick from your WordPress content or enter a custom URI at the bottom.
admin.feeHint: This is the checkout price customers pay via Stripe. Set to 0 for free access.
admin.currencyHint: Three-letter currency code (e.g. SEK, EUR, USD).
admin.allowedUsersHint: Users with access can view the full content without paying. Check existing users or add emails manually.
admin.addEmailHint: Grant access to someone who hasn't registered yet.
admin.stripePaymentsTooltip: View all payments, receipts, and refunds in Stripe's dashboard.
admin.buyableNo: Not buyable — set a price below to enable online purchase
admin.notBuyableHint: Set a price in the fee field below and save to enable Stripe checkout for this item.
admin.priceHintWcLp: WooCommerce and LearnPress prices are imported automatically from WordPress. Use the “Use WP price” button to lock in a price, or type a different value.
admin.priceHintEvents: Event Organiser has no built-in price field — price must be set manually in the config panel below.
admin.priceHintDigital: Digital file and course products have no WordPress source — price is set here and stored locally.
admin.cropHint: Drag to reposition, use the slider to zoom in or out. The result is saved as a square image.
admin.welcomeHeadline: Welcome to your new control room
admin.welcomeSlide1Body: You had a pure WordPress site with no WooCommerce or LearnPress checkout, a cluttered admin, and Lighthouse scores stuck around 50 while pages took 5-6 seconds to load.
admin.welcomeSlide2Body: RAGBAZ Articulate brings a clean GraphQL admin, hotkey-driven menu, live legend, and multilingual chat that understands logs, payments, and manuals.
admin.welcomeSlide3Title: Sales and Stripe in one place
admin.welcomeSlide3Body: Payments, refunds, and PDF receipts now live in the admin. Downloadable Stripe receipts, analytics, and a responsive sales panel keep critical data close at hand.
admin.welcomeSlide4Body: The storefront is now on Cloudflare Workers with source maps, Wrangler logs, and impressively fast 2s loads plus 90+ Lighthouse scores.
admin.welcomeHint: Use the arrows or scroll to navigate the story.
admin.cardSalesBody: Monitor payments, download Stripe receipts, and keep refunds close.
admin.cardStatsBody: Understand traffic, conversions, and Lighthouse lifts since the rebuild.
admin.cardShopBody: Curate WooCommerce/LearnPress products, metadata, and prices.
admin.cardChatBody: Ask about payments, access, docs, and logs with multilingual intelligence.
admin.styleSummary: Key typefaces, sizes, colors, and control behaviors for the RAGBAZ Articulate admin interface.
admin.styleTypographyDetail: Headings lean on the RAGBAZ neo-grotesque sans, the Articulate word adds a serif accent, and body copy runs in system UI at 16px with a 1.5 line-height.
admin.styleColorsDetail: Interactive elements use deep purples (#4C1D95, #7C3AED) with neutral grays for surfaces and green/amber indicators for statuses and badges.
admin.styleButtonsDetail: Buttons stretch to the available width, use px-4 py-2 padding, font-medium, purple backgrounds, and muted grays for disabled states.
admin.styleNote: Follow these tokens to keep the admin UI aligned with the storefront brand.
admin.userAccessOverviewDesc: Find a user and see which content they can access. Check or uncheck items to grant or revoke access.
admin.confirmRemoveProduct: Are you sure you want to remove this product? This cannot be undone.
admin.configuredBadgeTooltip: This item has a price and access rules configured.
admin.supportIntro: Log bugs and track fixes. Tickets stay local or in Cloudflare KV if configured.
admin.noTickets: No tickets yet. Create one to get started.
admin.imagePromptPlaceholder: Describe the image (or wait for AI to generate a prompt)...
admin.quotaExhausted: Daily limit reached. Resets at {time} UTC.
admin.imageSizeNeuronTip: Larger presets consume more Cloudflare AI neurons
admin.imageSaveFailed: Could not save image — try again or download instead
admin.noPaymentsDateHint: No payments in this date range — try a wider filter.
admin.noPaymentsHint: No charges found. Make sure STRIPE_SECRET_KEY is set and the Stripe account has charges.

stats.workersHint: Referrers, page views, and bandwidth require zone-level analytics. Route your Worker through a custom domain and set CF_ZONE_ID to upgrade.

chat.title: Chat
chat.subtitle: Ask questions about your content. Uses WordPress + LearnPress + events via WPGraphQL.
chat.placeholder: Ask a question about courses, events, products...
chat.empty: No messages yet. Ask something to get started.
chat.clearConfirm: Clear all chat messages? This cannot be undone.

health.wpNotConfigured: WordPress connection is not configured yet.
health.wpAuthMissing: WordPress authentication is missing. Set WORDPRESS_GRAPHQL_AUTH_TOKEN or WORDPRESS_GRAPHQL_USERNAME + WORDPRESS_GRAPHQL_APPLICATION_PASSWORD.
health.wpNotResponding: WordPress is not responding correctly right now.
health.wpConnectFailed: Could not connect to WordPress right now.
health.stripeNotResponding: Stripe is not responding correctly right now.
health.stripeConnectFailed: Could not connect to Stripe right now.
health.oauthNone: No external sign-in providers are configured.
health.wpSchemaOk: WPGraphQL schema — events: {event}, courses: {course}, sample event: {sampleEvent}, sample course: {sampleCourse}.
health.kvOk: Cloudflare KV is reachable — data will persist across restarts.
health.kvNotConfigured: Cloudflare KV is not configured. Data is stored in memory only and will be lost on restart. Set CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID, CF_API_TOKEN and CF_KV_NAMESPACE_ID to enable persistent storage.
health.kvFailed: Cloudflare KV is configured but unreachable. Falling back to in-memory storage — data will be lost on restart.

paywall.loggedInAs: You are signed in as {email}, but you don't have access to this {contentKind} yet.
paywall.paymentNotAvailable: Payment is not available yet. Contact the administrator.
paywall.signInToAccess: Sign in or register to purchase this {contentKind}.
paywall.emailMismatch: The email addresses do not match.
paywall.emailRequired: Enter your email address to continue.
paywall.guestBuyHint: Enter your email to purchase. We'll create an account and send you a link to set your password.
paywall.setPasswordBody: Welcome! Your account has been created. Click the link below to set your password:
paywall.loggedInNeedPurchase: You are signed in as {email}. To access this {contentKind}, complete the purchase below.
paywall.priceNotConfigured: Online purchase is not available for this item yet. Please contact us for more information.

shop.title: Shop
shop.subtitle: Courses, events, digital products and more.
shop.paymentSuccess: Payment confirmed. The product is now unlocked.
shop.paymentCancelled: Payment was cancelled. No charge was made.
shop.courseAccessDesc: You have purchased the course product. Sign in with the same email address you used for payment.
shop.courseAccessHint: Then go to the course page and open the content. If access is missing, wait a minute and reload the page.
shop.paymentNotAvailable: Payment is not available yet. Contact the administrator.
shop.paymentVerifyFailed: Your payment was received, but we couldn't verify it automatically.
shop.paymentVerifyHint: Don't worry — your access should appear within a few minutes. If it doesn't, contact support.
shop.paymentCancelledRetry: You can try again whenever you're ready.
shop.checkoutRetryHint: Please try again. If the problem persists, contact support.
shop.courseAccessDescSimple: You now have access to this course. Click the button below to start.

comments.title: Leave a comment
comments.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters.
comments.success: Comment submitted! It will appear after review.

s3.publicUrlMissing: S3_PUBLIC_URL is missing. Set the public URL for your bucket.

errors.accessCheckFailed: We're having trouble verifying your access right now. This may be due to a partial network outage affecting our systems. Please try reloading the page — if you have already purchased access, it has not been lost.

courses.title: Online Courses
courses.requiresLearnPress: The courses page requires LearnPress with WPGraphQL support.

contact.sent: Thank you, your message has been sent.
contact.failed: The message could not be sent right now.
contact.networkError: Could not send message. Check your connection and try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password.
resetPassword.emailSent: If an account exists with that email, a reset link has been sent.
resetPassword.emailBody: Click the link below to reset your password:
resetPassword.success: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.invalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
resetPassword.tokenExpired: This reset link has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.resetFailed: Could not reset the password right now. Please try again.
resetPassword.requestFailed: Could not process the request right now.
resetPassword.requestNewLink: Go back to the sign-in page and click "Forgot password?" to request a new link.
